compiled_state.title: [GREEN] Implement check-ac subcommand in ticket CLI dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Implement the `check-ac` subcommand in the ticket CLI dispatcher and ticket-lib-api.sh library.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (modify — add check-ac case + update _usage())
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh (modify — add ticket_check_ac() function)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ticket_check_ac()` added to ticket-lib-api.sh: `bash "$_TICKETLIB_DIR/check-acceptance-criteria.sh" "$@"; return $?`
- [ ] Function name: ticket_check_ac (underscores — bash function names cannot contain hyphens)
- [ ] `check-ac)` case added to dispatcher: `_ensure_initialized && source ticket-lib-api.sh && _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_check_ac "$@" && exit $?`
- [ ] _usage() string updated to include `check-ac` with description "Validate acceptance criteria block presence (0=pass, 1=fail)"
- [ ] Exit codes 0 (AC present) and 1 (AC missing) pass through dispatcher chain unmodified
- [ ] SOURCEABILITY CONTRACT preserved; _TICKETLIB_DIR used for path
- [ ] Task 114b-0b5a RED tests turn GREEN after implementation
- [ ] check-acceptance-criteria.sh is NOT modified (scope boundary)
